narrative:
Precinct Lake (precinct in Ashland County) has 421 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.8 percentage points.
